design_system.name: Osiris-9
design_system.description: A fusion of Ancient Egyptian monumentality and Deep Space mystery. Dark, gold-accented, and sharp.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-none px-8 py-4 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-white/20 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-none px-8 py-4
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-white/5 text-foreground hover:text-primary uppercase tracking-widest font-medium

cards.fact_card: group relative overflow-hidden bg-card border border-white/10 hover:border-primary/50 transition-all duration-500 p-8 flex flex-col gap-4
cards.category_card: aspect-square flex items-center justify-center bg-muted/20 hover:bg-primary/20 border border-white/5 hover:border-primary transition-all cursor-pointer group

inputs.default: bg-black/50 border-white/20 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-none h-12 px-4 text-lg font-mono placeholder:text-white/20

landing_page.hero: Full-screen height, centered content, 'Void Mist' background, large Cinzel typography, floating 3D pyramid or glowing orb.
landing_page.grid: Bento grid for 'Featured Facts'. Asymmetrical layout. Use 'col-span-2' for major controversies.
landing_page.decorations: Use SVG hieroglyphs as background patterns with low opacity (5%).

fact_detail.layout: Split screen: Left side = Image/Visual (Sticky), Right side = Scrollable text (Explanation).
fact_detail.typography: Drop caps for the first letter of the explanation (Ancient manuscript style).

dashboard.style: Command center. High density. Monospace fonts for data. Gold borders for active tabs.

assets.icons: Use 'Lucide-React'. Prefer sharp, geometric icons (e.g., 'Triangle', 'Hexagon', 'Zap', 'Eye'). Avoid rounded icons.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts link to the <head> of index.html immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the 'Osiris-9' color palette and font families. Set 'borderRadius' to '0' or '0.125rem' globally.
3. GLOBAL CSS: Add a global grain texture overlay using 'before' pseudo-element on the body to give it a film/ancient texture.
4. SHADCN OVERRIDES: When using Shadcn components, strip the 'rounded-md' classes and replace with 'rounded-none'. Add 'border-primary/20' to all cards.
5. DARK MODE: Force dark mode. Do not implement a light mode toggle. The theme is strictly 'Space Night'.
6. IMAGES: Apply 'grayscale' and 'contrast-125' filters to all photographic images to make them blend with the dark theme. Only reveal color on hover.
7. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every interactive element has a data-testid attribute.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text unless it is a very large heading.
Use 2x more padding than you think is necessary.
Every page must have a 'Hero' moment.
